plugin_desc: Barracuda CloudGen Firewall / Web Filter SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 20632. The shared Firewall SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. This child template adds verified bspyware system leaves for CPU/system temperature and firmware/log storage utilization. CPU, memory and fan/power-supply states are not promoted because stable shared state leaves are not confirmed; fan RPM and trap-only dead-fan signals are kept out of shared device health.
name: Firewall

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Barracuda CPU and system temperature readings, reported as the highest temperature per firewall instance.

metrics.name: device_disk_usage
metrics.description: Barracuda firmware and log storage utilization, reported as the highest utilization per firewall instance.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.

metrics.name: barracuda_cpu_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Barracuda firewall CPU temperature reading in degrees Celsius, from the bspyware system leaf OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.20632.3.1.10.3.0.

metrics.name: barracuda_system_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Barracuda firewall system temperature reading in degrees Celsius, from the bspyware system leaf OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.20632.3.1.10.4.0.

metrics.name: barracuda_firmware_storage_usage
metrics.description: Barracuda firewall firmware storage utilization percentage, from OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.20632.3.1.10.5.0.

metrics.name: barracuda_log_storage_usage
metrics.description: Barracuda firewall log storage utilization percentage, from OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.20632.3.1.10.6.0.
